creator: jseger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please resubmit this.  This port has a few problems:
1) It isn't based on the latest version of the port, so there are many
   gratuitous diffs.
2) It uses old-style LIB_DEPENDS lines.  Please update to the latest ports
   upgrade kit (so that you have the latest bsd.port.mk) so you can probably
   test this.
